word: G4284 - προέχομαι - proéchomai - pro-ekh-om-ahee - Be better

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to have before or in advance of another, to have pre - eminence over another, to excel, to surpass
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Middle voice from G4253 and G2192; to hold oneself before others, that is, (figuratively) to excel: - be better.
